# Go-Orca.Tech

> Custom CRM and software development for growing businesses. Purpose-built systems, not generic templates.

Go-Orca.Tech is a software development agency based in Massachusetts, USA. We build custom CRMs, internal dashboards, client portals, and web applications for small and mid-sized businesses. Fixed-price projects, 6-week average deployment, no hourly billing.

## Documentation

- [Developer Resources](https://go-orca.tech/developers): Full developer and agent integration hub
- [Agent Auth Guide](https://go-orca.tech/auth.md): OAuth flows, agent registration, scopes
- [API Catalog](https://go-orca.tech/.well-known/api-catalog): Available API endpoints (RFC 9727)
- [Agent Skills](https://go-orca.tech/.well-known/agent-skills/index.json): Agent-callable tools index
- [OpenAPI Spec](https://go-orca.tech/openapi.json): Machine-readable API specification

## Services

- [Homepage](https://go-orca.tech/): Custom CRM, apps, product development, plugins & integrations
- [About](https://go-orca.tech/about): Agency background, team, named clients
- [Contact / Get a Quote](https://go-orca.tech/contact): Fixed-price project quotes — 1 business day response

## Free Tools

- [CRM ROI Calculator](https://go-orca.tech/tools/crm-roi-calculator): Calculate annual savings and payback period
- [CAC Calculator](https://go-orca.tech/tools/cac-calculator): Customer acquisition cost calculator
- [CRM Cost Estimator](https://go-orca.tech/tools/crm-cost-estimator): Custom CRM build cost ranges
- [App Development Cost Guide](https://go-orca.tech/tools/app-development-cost): 2025 cost ranges for web and mobile apps
- [Go-Orca vs HubSpot](https://go-orca.tech/tools/go-orca-vs-hubspot): Side-by-side comparison
- [Go-Orca vs Salesforce](https://go-orca.tech/tools/go-orca-vs-salesforce): When to switch
- [Spreadsheet vs CRM](https://go-orca.tech/tools/spreadsheet-vs-crm): Decision framework
- [Custom vs Off-the-Shelf](https://go-orca.tech/tools/custom-vs-off-the-shelf): Build vs buy guide

## Legal & Trust

- [FAQ](https://go-orca.tech/faq): Pricing, timelines, ownership, and process
- [Privacy Policy](https://go-orca.tech/privacy): Data handling
- [Terms of Service](https://go-orca.tech/terms): Service agreement
